cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out the minimum number of moves a knight needs to go from a1 to h8 on a standard 8x8 chessboard. Let me start by recalling how a knight moves. A knight moves in an L-shape: two squares in one direction and then one square perpendicular to that. So from any given position, a knight can move to up to eight different squares, but of course, that depends on its current position on the board. Since the knight starts at a1, which is the bottom-left corner, and needs to get to h8, the top-right corner, I need to think about the shortest path between these two points.
